---
title: "Publications"
toc: false
---

::: {.page-hero}
## Publications and Work in Progress

This page collects selected publications and current research directions. As my computational modelling work develops, I will expand this section with posters, preprints, and thesis-related outputs.
:::

## Selected Publication

::: {.panel-card .publication-card}
### Journal Article

**Song, C., Chen, H., Gao, F., Qian, H., Geng, L., & Ye, X. (2025).**  
*L2 conditionally facilitates L3 word recognition among Chinese-English-Spanish trilinguals.*  
_International Journal of Multilingualism_, 1-19.  
[DOI](https://doi.org/10.1080/14790718.2025.2600536) · [PDF](publications/L2_primes_L3.pdf)
:::

## In Progress

::: {.grid-two}
::: {.panel-card}
### Modelling Projects

- Benchmarking human-model alignment in behavioural tasks
- LLM RSA for multilingual semantic representation
- RNN modelling of behavioural and fMRI responses
:::

::: {.panel-card}
### To Add

- Master's thesis
- Conference posters
- Preprints and working papers
- Project reports or reproducible analysis repositories
:::
:::
